details.productUrlName: Prismatic Ending JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description: Converge — Exile target nonland permanent if its mana value is less than or equal to the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
Some claim the archaics can die only after Arcavio's demise. Others claim their deaths herald the plane's doom. The truth? Only time will tell."
—Jadzi, Oracle of Arcavios
